full_text:
Bao Sanniang 鮑三娘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Sanniang (鮑三娘). Guan Suo’s wife. Both beautiful and skilled in combat. Bao Sanniang is a fictional character. Bao Sanniang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
